mapper.sql: SELECT abe.execution_id, abe.batch_key, abe.trigger_type, abe.status, abe.requested_by, u.email AS requested_by_email, abe.started_at, abe.finished_at, abe.duration_ms, abe.success_count, abe.failure_count, abe.message, abe.error_message FROM tb_admin_batch_execution abe LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = abe.requested_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_admin_batch_execution ( batch_key, trigger_type, status, requested_by, started_at, success_count, failure_count, message ) VALUES ( #{batchKey}, #{triggerType}, 'RUNNING', #{requestedBy}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{message} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_admin_batch_execution SET status = 'SUCCESS', finished_at = NOW(), duration_ms = #{durationMs}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, message = #{message}, error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE tb_admin_batch_execution SET status = 'FAILED', finished_at = NOW(), duration_ms = #{durationMs}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, message = #{message}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND status = 'RUNNING'
